@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expMs<nowMs=>401)
C: auth_mw∧allow_skew30_only
P: skew30_boundary_refresh_loop∧min_fix_reg_test
V: <∧401
A: add ∧ skew30 ∧ grace ∧ stop ∧ loop

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(expMs<nowMs implies 401).
Constraints: auth middleware and allow_skew30_only.
Plan: skew30_boundary_refresh_loop and min_fix_reg_test.
Verify: < and 401.
Answer target: add and 30-second grace window and grace and stop and loop.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(refresh_rotation_replay)
C: refresh_token∧reuse(old_refresh_token)=>409∧reject ∧ replay ∧ only ∧ once
P: parallel ∧ refresh ∧ race ∧ duplicates ∧ 409 ∧ loop∧verify
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: single-use ∧ rotate ∧ idempotent ∧ replay ∧ guard

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(refresh_rotation_replay).
Constraints: refresh_token and reuse(old_refresh_token) implies 409 and reject and replay and only and once.
Plan: parallel and refresh and race and duplicates and 409 and loop and verify.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: single-use and rotate and idempotent and replay and guard.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(webhook timestamp verify)
C: abs(now-ts)>300∧allow provider skew only
P: edge timestamp rejects valid webhook∧min_fix reg_test
V: "300"∧"401"
A: clamp skew∧reg test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(oauth_callback_expiry)
C: exp<now=>401∧normalize ∧ ms ∧ sec ∧ once
P: ms ∧ sec ∧ mismatch ∧ rejects ∧ fresh ∧ token∧min_fix ∧ regression
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: deliver ∧ min_fix ∧ regression

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(oauth_callback_expiry).
Constraints: exp<now implies 401 and normalize and ms and security and once.
Plan: ms and security and mismatch and rejects and fresh and token and min_fix and regression.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: deliver and min_fix and regression.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(stale_loop)
C: etag∧cache∧freshness∧age>=ttl=>stale
P: boundary∧serve∧fresh∧exact∧304
V: ttl∧304∧age=ttl
A: min_fix∧verify

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(stale_loop).
Constraints: etag and cache and freshness and age>=ttl implies stale.
Plan: boundary and serve and fresh and exact and 304.
Verify: ttl and 304 and age=ttl.
Answer target: min_fix and verify.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix ∧ retry ∧ storm ∧ at ∧ reset ∧ edge
C: now>reset=>allow∧release ∧ exactly ∧ at ∧ reset ∧ once
P: limiter ∧ reset ∧ window∧min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: 429∧retry-after
A: edge ∧ gate ∧ once ∧ at ∧ reset

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix and retry and storm and at and reset and edge.
Constraints: now>reset implies allow and release and exactly and at and reset and once.
Plan: limiter and reset and window and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: 429 and retry-after.
Answer target: edge and gate and once and at and reset.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(public_ping_auth_guard)
C: !session=>401 ∧ healthcheck ∧ bypass ∧ auth ∧ guard
P: null ∧ session ∧ on ∧ public ∧ ping∧preserve ∧ bypass
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: minimal_fix ∧ verify

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(public_ping_auth_guard).
Constraints: high-risk session implies 401 and healthcheck and bypass and auth and guard.
Plan: null and session and on and public and ping and preserve and bypass.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: minimal_fix and verify.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(billing_overdue_middleware)
C: overdue=>402∧grace24h∧24h∧402
P: boundary ∧ charge ∧ loop∧min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: "24h"∧"402"∧overdue⇒402
A: encode ∧ grace24

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(billing_overdue_middleware).
Constraints: overdue implies 402 and grace24h and 24h and 402.
Plan: boundary and charge and loop and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: "24h" and "402" and overdue implies 402.
Answer target: encode and grace24.
